args:
Use Codex internal Image Gen only for exactly one Seolleyeon AI profile asset.
Do not use OpenAI Image API. Do not use Batch API. Do not require OPENAI_API_KEY.
Do not modify CLIP/SVD/KNN/RRF recommender files or any recommender pipeline code.
Generate exactly one image, then stop. Do not continue to the next asset. Do not run QA.
Do not recover, copy, move, rename, or import generated files; the parent bounded executor owns recovery and file QA after this call.

Output geometry requirement:
- Generate a portrait image close to 2:3 aspect ratio, ideally 1024x1536.
- Do not create an ultra-tall, panoramic, square, or heavily cropped image.
- The recovered file must satisfy vertical profile file QA aspect ratio checks.

Single asset to generate:
assetId: female_003__silhouette_card__v001
profileId: female_003
gender: female
numericId: 003
shotType: silhouette_card
targetFaceType: None
targetLooksLevelBand: None
attempt: 1
promptHash: d237cdc1ecbea9ad729a7d11
expectedRawPath: C:/Users/samsung/StudioProjects/semisemifinal/ai_image/raw/female_003__silhouette_card__v001__attempt01.png
expectedFinalPath: C:/Users/samsung/StudioProjects/semisemifinal/ai_image/female/003/silhouette_card.png

Reference requirement:
- referenceAssetId: female_003__face_card__v001
- referenceImagePath: C:/Users/samsung/StudioProjects/semisemifinal/ai_image/female/003/face_card.png
- Use this face_card as the same-person identity anchor.
- If this Codex/Image Gen surface cannot use that reference image, stop and report reference_image_input_unavailable; do not generate an independent dependent shot.

Generation prompt:
Using the attached face_card image as the same person reference, generate exactly one silhouette_card image.

Asset metadata:
assetId: female_003__silhouette_card__v001
profileId: female_003
shotType: silhouette_card

Goal:
Same person as the reference face_card.
Generate a realistic 3/4 body or full-body smartphone profile photo.
The body frame and proportions should be readable.
Campus-appropriate modest clothing.
No oversized padding.
No revealing outfit.
No school uniform.
No text, no logo, no watermark.

Use this prompt:
A realistic adult Korean university student, approximately 20 years old, an adult woman, natural everyday profile photo, not a celebrity, not an influencer, authentic campus-based relationship profile style, calm and trustworthy impression.

Body and silhouette:
height impression around 162cm, small-to-medium frame, naturally fit build, low natural muscularity, narrow-to-medium shoulders, waist not strongly emphasized, medium hip line, balanced leg proportion, slightly short but balanced torso length, balanced adult head-to-body ratio, realistic adult body proportions, natural posture. Outfit shows the overall silhouette without being tight or revealing.

Styling:
regular-fit light cardigan, relaxed straight pants, simple campus tote bag, clean sneakers. casual campus everyday fashion, clean and modest.

Composition:
three-quarter body or full-body photo, standing or walking naturally, body proportions readable, no oversized padding, no extreme wide-angle distortion, camera at chest height, enough space around the body.

Location:
quiet university walkway with trees and neutral campus buildings in the background, no visible school logo, no readable text.

Lighting and camera:
soft daylight, realistic smartphone profile photo, natural colors, casual but carefully composed.

Avoid: childlike appearance, teenager, school uniform, idol trainee look, celebrity lookalike, influencer photoshoot, glamour studio lighting, heavy retouching, plastic skin, exaggerated beauty filter, revealing outfit, swimsuit, lingerie, nightclub, party scene, neon lighting, sexualized pose, luxury hotel background, identifiable school logo, visible real university name, text, watermark, distorted face, distorted hands, extra fingers, unrealistic body proportions.
